root.rep_text: รายงานค่าเสื่อม ณ วันที่

combo.accu_method: 0=ค่าเสื่อมสะสม/1=ค่าใช้จ่าย

root.sql:
SELECT sc_acc_m_expire.description, sc_acc_m_expire_estimate.meterial_id, sc_acc_m_expire_estimate.seq_no, sc_acc_m_expire_estimate.amount, sc_acc_m_expire_estimate.total_amount, sc_acc_m_expire_estimate.present_value, sc_acc_m_expire_estimate.cal_expire_date, sc_acc_m_expire.rate_expire, sc_acc_m_expire.amount_value, sc_acc_m_expire_estimate.operate_date, sc_acc_m_expire_estimate.item_type, sc_acc_m_expire_estimate.day_cal, sc_acc_m_expire.first_used_day, sc_acc_m_expire.balance, sc_acc_m_ucf_group_exp.group_name, sc_acc_m_expire.group_exp, sc_acc_m_expire.cut_paid_status, sc_acc_m_expire.accu_expire_amount, sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old, sc_acc_m_expire_estimate.begin_exp, sc_acc_m_expire_estimate.buy_in_year, sc_acc_m_expire_estimate.remark, sc_acc_m_expire_estimate.bf_value, pka_acc.fp_get_account_startdate() as account_startdate FROM sc_acc_m_expire, sc_acc_m_expire_estimate, sc_acc_m_ucf_group_exp WHERE ( sc_acc_m_expire_estimate.meterial_id = sc_acc_m_expire.material_id ) and ( sc_acc_m_expire.group_exp = sc_acc_m_ucf_group_exp.group_exp )
/*WHERE*/ -- and sc_acc_m_expire_estimate.cal_expire_date between :adtm_begindate and :adtm_enddate order by sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old
